title: Disney Frozen Celebrate Together Hanging Metal Wall Decor - Fun Elsa and Anna Sign for Christmas Decorating
features: Disney Official product: Add some Disney charm to your holiday decor with this Frozen Celebrate Together metal sign. Featuring Anna and Elsa, its a magical seasonal accent.
Fun Vintage Sign: This beautifully printed metal sign showcases Anna and Elsa in a festive winter scene. Its lightweight, easy to hang, and brings cozy Frozen vibes to your space.
Material: Printed on metal with hanging rope for easy hanging. Made in USA.
Places to Use: Perfect for entryways, living rooms, or children's bedrooms.
description: Add some Disney charm to your holiday decor with this Frozen Celebrate Together metal sign. Featuring Anna and Elsa, its a magical seasonal accent.
